//: Shared project hooks. Cross-platform: bare `cargo`/`curl` invocations (on PATH everywhere), no shell operators or scripts. Runs from the session's project-root cwd. Personal/machine settings live in the gitignored settings.local.json.
//recall: SessionStart injects the junto-dev channel brief into agent context — the recall bridge until membership-time injection exists (docs/adr/0013). -sf fails silently when `junto serve` isn't running; -m 2 keeps a hung host from stalling session start.
//mcp: Pre-approve the .mcp.json junto server (the dogfooding write surface) so every checkout — fresh clones AND new worktrees — gets the record/view tools without a per-project approval prompt. Connects to the singleton host on 127.0.0.1:1727 (one host per machine serves all checkouts); degrades to a silent no-op when `junto serve` isn't running, exactly like the recall hook above. A per-checkout disable still wins via the gitignored settings.local.json.

PostToolUse.//: The `if` filters fire cargo only for Rust-relevant files — doc/config edits spawn nothing (no console flash on Windows, no wasted clippy run). Per-tool `if` rules because a rule names its tool.
